Name: Ship Shape IMO - Marine/Offshore Compliant Mattresses and Hotel Supplies
Description:
Ship Shape IMO is part of Ship Shape World LTD based in the UK, we are International off-shore cabin Equipment and Consumable Suppliers, specialising in IMO, SOLAS Compliant, MED WheelMarked, Source 5 and 7, MLC, MODU Code and USCG Approved products for offshore use. With our production facilities, we produce a comprehensive range of hard and soft furnishing products including Beds, Mattresses, Pillows, Duvets, Sheets, Bedding, Towels, DRY-Mat anti-condensation mattress ventilation underlay, Furniture, Curtains, Shower Curtains, Lockers, Flooring and many more products which meet the stringent safety standards required for an off-shore Vessel/Rig. What is ideal for life at home isn’t always suitable for life at sea nor does it meet the required levels of fire safety. Here at Ship Shape IMO our aim is to supply our customers with fully compliant products to reduce the potential disruptions and unnecessary expense to corporations.

“Surveyors and port officials have the power to fine or block movements of vessels for failure to comply with the required legislation”

Our aim is to make sure this doesn’t happen, we are here to give advice and make sure your heading in the right direction.

We have supplied products to Commercial Cargo Shipping Vessels, Off Shore Energy Rigs, Ferries, Passenger Vessels and Military Vessels. 

Contact us today by phone on +44 (0) 3333 580 233 
or

Name: Marion Italia
Description:
Marion è la fabbrica di materassi in lattice creata per raggiungere 2 importanti obiettivi.

Il primo nasce da un pensiero di Friedrich Nietzsche: “Quando la virtù ha dormito si alza più fresca”.
Estendere i benefici di un buon sonno è l’obiettivo che ha spinto Marion a vendere al pubblico con prezzi da ingrosso. Il lattice è un materiale tanto prezioso quanto raro e proprio queste 2 caratteristiche lo rendono economicamente inaccessibile. 
È per questo che Marion si è dotata di una struttura organizzativa intelligente, che ha fatto a meno di intermediari e rivenditori, per semplificare il rapporto produttore-consumatore, e dare a tutti l’opportunità di possedere un materasso in lattice a prezzi di fabbrica.
Il secondo obiettivo è espresso dal pay off dell’azienda: SOLUZIONI PER DORMIRE. Il sonno è diverso in ognuno di noi: cambia nei modi, nella quantità e nella qualità, da persona a persona. È per questo che Marion offre sistemi di riposo personalizzabili. Grazie alla sua vasta gamma di materassi in lattice, guanciali e reti a doghe, è in grado di assecondare le esigenze di qualsiasi cliente.
Marion nasce nel 1999 col preciso intento di diffondere la cultura del riposo in Italia. È negli ambienti accademici, nei centri di studio e ricerca che Marion muove i primi passi. L’obiettivo è quello di individuare il materiale ideale, quello che più di tutti assicura ergonomicità, igiene e biocompatibilità.
Il lattice registra le migliori performance e nel 1999 prende avvio la produzione del primo materasso in lattice Marion.

Did you know our mattresses are not only made in the USA but also made in our on-site factory! Plus we offer the best prices and top quality! Come check us out! 
What we have:

Memory Foam Hybrid: 
Sleep in comfort on our memory foam hybrid mattresses. These mattresses include memory foam that supports and contours to your body for a great nights rest at great prices!

Memory Foam Mattresses: Since the 90s, memory foam mattresses have gained popularity among the masses. These mattresses are popular for evenly distributing weight and relieving joint pain. Even if you are a restless sleeper, memory foam can make sleeping easy for you.
Latex Mattresses: Latex mattresses are made of foam that is a porous material that has high resilience. It is a durable, environmentally friendly material that is also hypoallergenic. Latex mattresses are a perfect option because they take the pressure off your muscles, joints, and back, encouraging better spinal alignment.

Pillow Top: Pillow top mattresses are regular mattresses with a cushy top layer added for extra-comfort. They are known for relieving pressure and are considered extremely comfortable. There are two basic versions: the regular pillow top and the euro top.

Adjustable Beds: Adjustable beds are the perfect choice for those seeking a comfortable sleep experience. With unique features like zero-gravity, massage functions, timed adjustments, vibrating alarms and USB ports - adjustable bed users can find exactly what they need to get optimal restful nights.

Name: Suprema srl
Description: La SUPREMA S.R.L. nasce a Leinì (TO) nel 1980 come un piccolo laboratorio familiare artigianale specializzato nella produzione di materassi a molle. Con il passare del tempo, l’azienda cresce e diversifica la produzione, iniziando a fabbricare reti da letto nel 1989. Nel 1993, in risposta a un’ulteriore espansione produttiva, viene costruito un nuovo stabilimento a San Severo (FG). Nel 2004, con l’obiettivo di ottimizzare la produzione e migliorare la gestione della clientela, la produzione del settore materassi viene trasferita al nord Italia. Oggi, nello stabilimento di Leinì (TO), su una superficie di 5.000 mq, si realizza l’intero ciclo produttivo: dalla progettazione alla produzione e commercializzazione di una vasta gamma di materassi, tra cui modelli in Memory Foam, a molle, in lattice, in espanso, materassi per la prima infanzia e reti da letto. Tante tipologie per soddisfare tante esigenze.

Crediamo nel materasso rigido e sostenuto, ma con un grado di comfort molto elevato, la Upper Comfort Zone dei nostri materassi è una scala che misura quanto incide il livello di comfort, per scegliere in base alla rigidità ma anche in base al comfort di cui hai bisogno.

Name: Tamba Dream
Description:
C’era una volta un produttore artigianale che si chiamava Giovanni Armani, che è stato talmente lungimirante da pensare al benessere dei suoi clienti in giro per l’Italia già nell’estate del lontano 1945. Appena avviata, la sua azienda produceva fra le varie cose anche reti da letto robuste, fatte per durare nel tempo. Qualche anno dopo, cominciò a produrre prima materassi in lana e poi a molle. Il suo obiettivo era quello di soddisfare il bisogno di dormire bene offrendo prodotti di alta qualità. La sua tenacia e passione faranno in modo che il suo prodotto artigianale, robusto e curato, arrivi ad affiancare i grandi marchi industriali, con i quali competere grazie alla dinamicità dei servizi e alla personalizzazione dei modelli. Nel 1990, sua figlia Cinzia fonda la nuova azienda “Casa Gaia”: ha inizio la seconda generazione. Cinzia è un esempio brillante di imprenditoria femminile ed è d’ispirazione per tutti e tutte coloro che intraprendono questo mestiere. La terza generazione comincia con Jonathan, figlio di Cinzia, che nel 2019 crea l’azienda “Tamba”. La consapevolezza delle sue radici e il suo essere stato immerso da sempre in questo ambiente, hanno forgiato le sue competenze da acuto imprenditore.
L’idea nasce da Jonathan, nel voler fornire soluzioni di riposo sempre più all’avanguardia e a portata di tutti, che, insieme a Maria Rosa, hanno coniugato la vendita di soluzioni e complementi d’arredo particolari e ricercati. Per loro è importante credere in un futuro migliore e nel benessere collettivo, per questa ragione si impegnano ad offrire prodotti di qualità che siano anche etici, sostenibili ed ecofriendly, senza mai dimenticare il gusto estetico. La passione per tutto ciò che è bello e confortevole, per il vintage, le piante, i colori sono elementi che hanno ispirato la nascita di Tamba, il cui motto è Dream, Sleep, Live Well. Sognare, dormire, vivere bene…tre verbi che conducono ad un unico obiettivo: amare.

Name: TheUltimateInstall
Description:
The Floating Header is designed to give you the added support needed to hang your heavy and wide window treatments where you haven’t been able to before. Here are some of the great applications for The Floating Header: 
Arched windows
Transom windows
Garden and Vinyl windows
Narrow Casements
Aluminum Windows
Avoid voiding warranties by mounting into the wall instead of the window frame
Divide over-sized skylight openings
False Ceilings
Applications where flammability is a concern
Impact Resistant Windows
Anywhere else center support is required!
The Floating Header is easy to install requiring only 1 person and a power drill. Treatments can be mounted to the front, bottom, or both. Arched blinds can also be installed on the top of the header.
The Floating Header is made of tubular steel powder coated in a satin white finish. The header is secured to two brackets which side-mount to either side of the window.
Each Floating Header is custom made for a precise fit for your unique application. Choose from: Medium Duty, Heavy Duty or the Super Duty system, depending on the strength you need. The Medium Duty has a cross section of 1-1/4” by 1-1/4”. The Heavy and Super Duty systems have a cross section of 2” by 1”. 
Your treatments can be attached to the steel header with the provided self-tapping, self drilling screws; no pilot holes necessary!

Name: Colchões Inlatex
Description:
"A essência do bem dormir está em acordar disposto e viver bem." Essas foram as palavras que nortearam nossa decisão de que as pessoas precisam ser felizes e superar momentos de ansiedade e estresse.

 

Durante a pandemia de 2020, as pessoas começaram a valorizar mais o conforto dentro de suas casas. Foi quando percebemos uma necessidade urgente: colchões que proporcionassem não apenas conforto, mas também qualidade de sono, durabilidade e responsabilidade com o bem-estar.

 

Com isso em mente, a INLATEX se dedicou a compreender o mercado brasileiro e descobriu uma carência de conhecimento sobre a escolha do colchão ideal. A partir daí, surgiu a ideia de buscar o melhor material, trabalhar com o melhor acabamento e comprovar sua eficiência para os consumidores.

Em 2021, a INLATEX foi fundada com o slogan: "Quando dormir é natural."

 

"Tínhamos em nossas mãos a matéria-prima que trazia todas as qualidades e benefícios que buscávamos. Nosso conteúdo não empurrava um produto, mas ajudava o cliente a identificar o ideal para seu perfil de consumo, biotipo e conforto."

 

Localizada em Santa Catarina, no Vale do Itajaí, a região europeia do Brasil, unimos a força brasileira, o perfil sistemático dos europeus e a tecnologia americana do látex para desenvolver o melhor colchão confeccionado e desenvolvido no Brasil.

Name: toshakroyall
Description:
گروه تولیدی صنعتی رویال در سال 1388 با شعار «تجربه یک خواب راحت» با مدیریت جناب آقای مهندس مصطفی روزگار فعالیت خود را در زمینه ی تولید تشک آغاز نمود.
مواد اولیه ی مرغوب و تکنولوژی به روز تولید این تشک ها به کمک کادر متخصص فروش، موجب گردید که این شرکت طی سه سال جایگاه مناسبی را در بازار کالای خواب ایجاد نماید و اقدام به تولید سایر محصولات از جمله تاب های ریلکسی، تخت خواب، باکس و محافظ تشک نماید.
درصد بسیار بالا و قابل توجه رضایت مشتریان و میزان بسیار پایین عودت محصولات این اعتماد را برای مدیران شرکت فراهم آورد که بالاترین ضمانت تعویض ممکن در سطح کشور را برای محصولات خود در نظر گیرند که در کنار اخذ استانداردهای مربوطه و گواهینامه های کنترل کیفی و مدیریت تولید روز دنیا و تاییدیه های بهداشتی از مراجع مربوطه، با ایجاد شبکه گسترده فروش بالغ بر 350 نمایندگی و عاملیت در سطح کشور، گروه تولیدی صنعتی رویال را در زمره ی یکی از بزرگترین و تخصصی ترین تولیدکنندگان کالای خواب در ایران قرار داده است.
این مجموعه در حال حاضر با توجه به نیل به بالاترین جایگاه های ممکن فروش کشوری و در راستای صادرات تولید ملی و بومی، ارزآوری مداوم و کارافرینی پایدار، ورود به عرصهی بازار بین المللی و علی الخصوص خاورمیانه نموده است که در این زمینه توانسته تقاضای مشتریان خارج از کشور را به بهترین شکل ممکن تأمین نماید.
رقابت با شرکت های معتبر بین المللی ترکیه و آمریکا، کادر مجرب مدیریت این مجموعه را برآن داشته است تا با ایجاد تحولات عظیم در سطح تکنولوژی تولید، مواد اولیه، بازار فروش و علم تبلیغات و برندینگ، برندی قدرتمند را در بازار بین المللی ایجاد نماید.

Name: Leonflex srl
Description: Leonflex S.r.l., dal 1974, si occupa della produzione e distribuzione in tutto il territorio italiano e non solo, di reti da letto e materassi, sia per privati, aziende e hotellerie, ossia all'industria alberghiera, comprendente tutte le strutture che offrono alloggio e servizi di ristorazione per i viaggiatori. L’azienda si basa sulla disponibilità e sulla competenza che ogni giorno, da oltre quarant’anni, gli eredi di Leonardo Pellegrino propongono nel loro mestiere. Ogni materasso e ogni rete da letto prodotta è frutto di uno studio attento e continuo sulle nuove tecnologie. Le aziende e i grossisti che desiderano acquistare i materassi e le reti da letto, possono rivolgersi alla Leonflex per avere un preventivo adatto ad ogni specifica esigenza, oltre a consultare un’ampia campionatura. La Leonflex utilizza, nella sua fabbrica, macchinari all’avanguardia e alimentati ad energia solare; questo, assieme agli imballaggi ecosostenibili, ne fanno una realtà aziendale con uno sguardo rivolto al futuro e al benessere del pianeta. Leonflex dispone, dunque, di una vasta gamma di sistemi letto, reti motorizzate, materassi, guanciali, letti imbottiti, brande e altri accessori come topper in memory e meccanismi di sollevamento per letti contenitori.

Nossa História
 
A Meron foi inspirada em uma palavra bíblica que nos remete ao crescimento. Somos uma indústria de colchões, atuante no mercado desde 2006, nosso objetivo principal é fabricar produtos com um diferencial visível de qualidade e atendimento ao cliente e para isto contamos com uma equipe especializada nas fabricações, desde o processo inicial a entrega segura e ágil.                                                                                                  
Inicialmente produzíamos estofados, mas com o passar do tempo fomos conquistando o mercado, ampliando nossas atividades para a fabricação de Colchões de espumas e molas, camas box e acopladas. Hoje estamos operando no Nordeste e em outros estados da federação, nos tornando uma das empresas que mais cresce nesse seguimento, reforçando nosso compromisso em aprimorar ainda mais nossos serviços apresentando ao consumidor final um produto de qualidade e confiança.

VISÃO

Ser reconhecida nacionalmente como empresa líder na qualidade e conforto dos produtos fabricados.

MISSÃO

Empenhar-se diariamente na produção de melhores produtos, proporcionando o máximo de conforto aos nossos clientes.

VALORES DA EMPRESA
 Responsabilidade acima de tudo, reafirmando nosso compromisso com a confiança e lealdade em oferecer produtos de qualidade aos nossos clientes.

Name: superior life
Description:
Superior Life es una empresa pionera en la fabricación y comercialización de colchones ortopédicos y terapéuticos, comprometida con mejorar la calidad del sueño y el bienestar de sus clientes. Nuestra misión es ofrecer soluciones innovadoras y personalizadas en el ámbito del descanso, combinando los avances tecnológicos más recientes con los principios ergonómicos y terapéuticos más efectivos.

En Superior Life, nos enorgullecemos de utilizar materiales de alta calidad y técnicas de fabricación avanzadas para producir colchones que se adaptan a las necesidades específicas de cada persona, garantizando un soporte adecuado para la columna vertebral y la distribución óptima del peso del cuerpo. Nuestros colchones ortopédicos y terapéuticos están diseñados para aliviar dolores de espalda, cuello y articulaciones, facilitando una postura correcta y promoviendo la recuperación física durante el sueño.

Además, nuestra gama de colchones tecnológicos integra características innovadoras  lo que permite a nuestros clientes ajustar y personalizar su experiencia de descanso según sus preferencias y necesidades.

En Superior Life, nos esforzamos por ofrecer un servicio excepcional, desde el asesoramiento personalizado hasta la entrega e instalación de nuestros productos. Nuestro equipo de expertos está siempre dispuesto a ayudar a los clientes a encontrar el colchón perfecto que se adapte a sus necesidades y preferencias.

Superior Life se ha consolidado como una marca de confianza y calidad en el mercado de colchones. Experimente un sueño reparador y un bienestar superior con los colchones de Superior Life, y descubra por qué somos la opción preferida para miles de personas que buscan un descanso saludable y revitalizante.

One of our companies - Petformed.com has used the technology to create a brand of orthopaedic dog mattresses. The company quickly earned the name of no.1 best-selling orthopaedic dog bed in Poland.

Name: Fenêtre Déco
Description:
Fenêtre Déco provides all of your window covering needs including ultrasonic blind cleaning, blind repair, installation, and we are a proud partner of the Hunter Douglas brand (The finest window coverings in the Market).

Fenêtre Déco began in 1999 as an ultrasonic blind cleaning business. Inevitably clients would ask that we repair broken blinds while we cleaned them so we began stocking parts and we now have one of the largest blind parts inventory in greater Montreal.
Shortly after, in order to provide a more comprehensive service, we decided to become and window covering retailer. We discovered that our repair experience was of great benefit when came the time to advise customers in their choice of new products for their homes or offices. We not only see what blinds look like new but we see how they fare 2, 5 and 10 years later.
Today, we still offer ultrasonic blind cleaning and we have expanded our product line to include motorized shades which can be linked to home automation systems.
We provide service for homeowners and businesses as well as working with designers, architects, and general contractors.

Name: Qipendi GmbH
Description:
Wusstest du, dass 7 von 10 Deutsche auf einem falschen Härtegrad schlafen? Der Mensch ist ein Gewohnheitstier, oft gewöhnen wir uns bereits im Kindesalter einen falschen Härtegrad an. Unser Körper verändert sich im Laufe der Jahre: Wir nehmen zu, wir nehmen ab – aber eins bleibt gleich: die Matratze. 
Die Folgen sind vielfältig. Manch einer schläft schlecht ein oder kann nicht durchschlafen, während ein anderer mit körperlichen Schmerzen zu kämpfen hat. Aber eins haben alle gemein: Sie nehmen die Probleme aus der Nacht mit durch den Tag in Form von Müdigkeit, Konzentrationsschwäche und Schmerzen.
Es gibt viele Faktoren, die einen positiven und einen negativen Einfluss auf unseren Schlaf haben können. Doch manchmal sieht man den Wald vor lauter Bäumen nicht mehr und vergisst das wichtigste: Die Matratze! 
Du willst wissen, was die beste Matratze für deinen Schlaf ist? Dann freuen wir uns auf deine Kontaktaufnahme!
https://www.qipendi.de/qipendi-entdecken

Name: TRIFLEX MATERASSI
Description:
- La Triflex nasce a Sulmona nel 1984, fondata dal Cavaliere Sebastiano Tricarico che opera nel settore della produzione materassi dal 1960.  La lunga esperienza, il costante adeguamento degli impianti industriali abbinato alla cura artigianale di ogni prodotto, sono le caratteristiche principali della Triflex.  L’azienda da sempre segue con attenzione i cambiamenti e le evoluzioni che caratterizzano il mercato dei materassi, adeguando costantemente prodotti e materiali alle nuove normative tecniche e alle nuove caratteristiche di comfort. L'azienda è attenta all'impatto ambientale sia nel processo produttivo sia nella accurata selezione delle materie prime e dei materiali impiegati, nell'ottica della economia circolare.
L’azienda ha implementato un sistema di gestione per la qualità, conseguendo la certificazione UNI EN ISO 9001:2015 Certificato n. 40951/21/S rilasciato da RINA SERVICES SPA ed è certificata anche per il settore navale RINA – MED –TIMONCINO certificato n. MED009824AN
Attività: Produzione e commercializzazione di:
- materassi di varie tipologie, per la casa, per comunità e strutture ricettive, hotel e alberghi, strutture sanitarie, caserme e navale
- Materassi a molle, in lattice, in memory, in poliuretano, ignifughi, sanitari
- Basi letto in ferro e doghe, sommier, letti di vario genere, divani e trasformabili
- Guanciali di tutti i tipi, coprimaterassi, piumini 
- Biancheria da letto e da bagno, tovagliati, copritavoli
- Contract alberghiero, produzioni personalizzate e su misura
* Clienti: settore del mobile e dell’arredamento domestico, settore del contract alberghiero e numerosi alberghi, comunità laiche e religiose, strutture ricettive varie, settore navale e settore sanitario, accredito MEPA per le forniture alla pubblica amministrazione, Esercito Italiano, Arma dei Carabinieri, Forestali, Ministero di Giustizia.

Name: Rollxpert AG
Description:
Willkommen bei der Rollxpert AG – Ihr Experte für Rollladen, Markisen und Beschattungssysteme
Bei der Rollxpert AG dreht sich alles um Ihren Komfort und Ihre Zufriedenheit. Ob Sichtschutz, Sonnenschutz oder zuverlässige Reparaturen an Rollladen , Markisen und anderen Beschattungssysteme – wir stehen Ihnen mit unserer langjährigen Erfahrung und Leidenschaft zur Seite.
Unser Ziel ist es, Ihnen den besten Service zu bieten: schnell, zuverlässig und professionell. Mit einem engagierten Team aus Fachleuten stehen wir Ihnen jederzeit zur Verfügung – sei es für Reparaturen, Wartungen oder individuelle Beratungen. Wir hören zu, verstehen Ihre Bedürfnisse und entwickeln Lösungen, die genau zu Ihnen passen.
Wir verstehen, wie wichtig funktionierende Rollladen und Stores für Ihren Alltag sind – sei es, um Ihr Zuhause vor Sonne, Hitze oder neugierigen Blicken zu schützen, oder um die Atmosphäre in Ihren Räumen zu verbessern. Unser Fokus liegt auf Qualität, Präzision und einer individuellen Betreuung, um sicherzustellen, dass Ihre Systeme nicht nur perfekt funktionieren, sondern auch Ihren ästhetischen Ansprüchen gerecht werden.
 Warum Rollxpert AG?
•	Zuverlässigkeit: Wir halten, was wir versprechen – pünktlich, kompetent und verbindlich.
•	Erfahrung: Unser Team bringt langjährige Expertise in der Reparatur und Wartung von Rollladen, Markisen und Beschattungssystemen mit.
•	Innovation: Wir setzen auf moderne Techniken und Lösungen, um Ihre Anforderungen optimal zu erfüllen.
•	Kundennähe: Ihre Zufriedenheit ist unser Maßstab. Wir sind erst zufrieden, wenn Sie es sind.
Egal, ob es um die Reparatur eines beschädigten Rollladens, die Wartung Ihrer Markisen oder die Planung eines neuen Beschattungssystems geht – wir sind Ihr zuverlässiger Partner.
Vertrauen Sie auf die Rollxpert AG – Ihr Experte für Sichtschutz, Sonnenschutz und Überwachungssysteme. Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam dafür sorgen, dass alles rundläuft. Kontaktieren Sie uns und erleben Sie Service auf höchstem Niveau!

Name: DRD Furnishing
Description:
Welcome to DRD furnishing! We are a premier provider of high-quality hospital equipment and furnishings, dedicated to creating safe and comfortable environments for patients and healthcare professionals alike.

Established in 2019, our company has quickly become a trusted name in the healthcare industry. We specialize in a wide range of hospital products and services, including hospital curtain track systems, window roller blinds, IV hangers, wall guards, corner guards, hospital furniture, and much more. 

DRD Furnishing, a renowned manufacturer of hospital curtain and track systems, offers a wide range of top-quality products at highly competitive prices. With our state-of-the-art manufacturing unit dedicated to curtain production, we ensure exceptional craftsmanship and durability. Our commitment to timely delivery has earned us a strong reputation in the industry. Presently, we cater to clients across India and also export to neighboring countries, expanding our global presence.

At DRD Furnishing, we are committed to providing the best possible solutions for our clients. We understand that each healthcare facility has unique needs, and we work closely with our clients to design and install custom solutions that meet their specific requirements. 

Our team of experienced engineers and installers are dedicated to delivering exceptional customer service. We take pride in our attention to detail, and we are always available to answer any questions or concerns our clients may have. 
We believe that our hospital equipment and furnishings can make a significant difference in the lives of patients and healthcare professionals. That's why we only work with the highest quality materials and manufacturers, ensuring that our solutions are durable and safe. 

Thank you for considering DRD Furnishing for your hospital equipment and furnishings needs. We are confident that we can provide the solutions you need to create a safe and comfortable healthcare environment.

Name: The Blinds Experience
Description:
Quality blinds at a price you can afford | We Help You Create the Perfect Home:Blinds that Reflect Your Style and Transform Your Living Space  |

The Blinds Experience is the result of four individuals wanting to create a values-based company that has a real point of difference for its customers, and operates ethically and with integrity in our community.

Our background brings together over 10 years of combined customer relationship and blinds industry operational experience. 

You may be thinking,
“How can I get some independent advice on ideas and concepts to make my home or workplace look better, versus a salesperson promoting only their products?” 

Unique to The Blinds Experience is the option for you to have that independent advice. 
Through our Independent Interior Design Consultation option, you have the choice of a home visit and truly personalized interior design consultation.

This will be around 60-90 minutes for a $150 NZD fee*. One of our Independent Professional Interior Designers will meet with you in your home to provide independent, genuine, and personalized options on creating the look and home experience you want – whilst working with your budget. 

* Should you proceed to purchase blinds from The Blinds Experience the design consultation fee will be reimbursed

Total Care Package.
We want your new blinds to be a memorable experience. That is why you will have our support not only during the selection process of buying your new blinds, but after you are already enjoying them.

With this in mind, we are excited to give our customers a special after-sales care  package that includes 3 calls/visits to take care of your blinds and keep them working as new, so that you can always feel proud of your home!

On top of all, we are committed to helping our New Zealand vulnerable communities. We have chosen two New Zealand charities to support, and will donate 5% of the value of your purchase (excluding gst).

Contact us today to get your free quote.

Bugün perde ve sistemleri alanında geniş bir ürün yelpazesine sahip olan LORE'S PERDE; yurtiçi ve yurtdışı showroomlarında yüzlerce tasarım sergilemekte, müşterilerinin projeleriyle birlikte bir çok mekanda ürünleri ile boy göstermektedir. Grup olarak 41 yıla ulaşan deneyim ve bilgi birikiminin ürünü olan koleksiyonlarımızı, gelişmiş bayi ağımızla Türkiye ve dünyada farklı noktalara ulaştırırken, yaşam alanlarına renk katıp, yaşam kalitesini artırmak hedefiyle çalışmalarımızı artırarak sürdürmekteyiz. Bize güç veren, üretimin her safhasındaki kaybolmayan heyecan ve kalite tutkusu ile tüm bunların ötesinde ürünlerimize duyduğumuz güvendir.

Name: Melodreams
Description:
Founded in 1988, Melody Group embarked on a remarkable journey with the manufacturing of plastic containers, establishing a state-of-the-art facility that was the first of its kind. As pioneers in blow molding and injection molding, we proudly served esteemed customers such as Zandu, India Glycol, Indian Oil, Astral Adhesive (Resinova) and Jubilant.

Our Heritage
Our story began with a vision to revolutionize the plastic container manufacturing industry. With our cutting-edge technology and unwavering commitment to quality, we quickly became leaders in the field. Our dedication to innovation and excellence has been the cornerstone of our success.

Milestones and Expansion
2000: A significant year in our history, we incorporated and diversified into pharmaceutical manufacturing, launching Melody Pharmaceuticals. Over the years, we established our presence across the horizon, from Jammu to Kanyakumari, and from the extreme east of Assam to the extreme west of Gandhinagar. We proudly supply to prominent leaders in healthcare, such as Apollo and Tata Hospitals.


Expansion into New Industries: Building on our expertise in the plastic industry, we ventured into the expanded polyethylene sheet sector. Melody Group was the first company in India to import this cutting-edge Korean technology, setting up another state-of-the-art facility that underscored our commitment to innovation.


Latest Ventures
Our continued success and expertise in various industries led us to the mattress industry. We now offer luxurious, comfortable, and customer-centric mattresses, designed to provide the ultimate in relaxation and quality. Each product is crafted with the same dedication to excellence that has defined our journey.

Name: Bleu.eco
Description:
Bleu.eco est une entreprise qui fabrique des produits écologiques depuis maintenant 15 ans. De projet modeste à plus de 30 000 pieds carrés de superficie aujourd’hui, l’entreprise fondée par Richard Lapointe a su innover et user d’audace au fil des ans, expliquant son beau succès.

La tendance étant présentement aux matelas en boîte, roulés et compressés, beaucoup plus facile à livrer à moindres coûts, Bleu.eco a investi ce marché avec succès ces dernières années. L’entreprise possède également une salle de montre moderne et intime, des bureaux spacieux, une menuiserie et une usine fonctionnelle de 13 000 pieds carrés.

Bleu.eco mise sur le commerce électronique avec son site transactionnel efficace et clair. Acheter un matelas 100 % québécois directement du manufacturier, comme chez Bleu.eco, sans intermédiaire, devient alors très simple.

UN SOMMEIL ÉCORESPONSABLE
Les matelas, produits phare de Bleu.eco, sont composés en grande partie d'huiles naturelles provenant de ressources renouvelables. Toutes les mousses sont écologiques et certifiées Certipur et les matelas sont recouverts de housses en coton 100 % biologique. Ce coton est cultivé selon des techniques organiques et sans OGM. L’absence de pesticides chimiques et de colorants rend également très agréable le toucher de ce coton. Le tout est carboneutre, puisque Bleu.eco s’est donné le mandat de planter 3 arbres pour chaque matelas vendu.

FABRIQUÉ AU QUÉBEC À 100 %
Que ce soit des matelas, oreillers ou lits articulés, tous les produits de Bleu.eco sont conçus et fabriqués au Québec, à son usine de Saint-Hyacinthe. Les fournisseurs majeurs de l’entreprise sont situés dans un rayon de 60 km de l’usine, tout au plus.

Le 100 % québécois prend tout son sens avec Bleu.eco! L’entreprise est d’ailleurs l’une des rares à fabriquer et mettre en marché des matelas écologiques au Québec.

Name: ETD Textile
Description:
2001 Yılında faliyete geçen teknolojiyi modern çizgiler ile bütünleştiren firmamız sektöründe öncü bir konum sahibidir. Türkiye'nin en önemli sanayi merkezlerinden olan Bursa'da 12.000 metre karelik alanda bulunan fabrikamız jakarlı dokuma yapmaktadır. Zebra, stor tül, baskılı zebra, fonluk, armül dokuma kumuşı üretiminde bulunan fabrikamız yıllık 3.000.000 metre kapasitesinde üretim yapmaktadır. Makina parkurumuz son teknolojiyle donatılmış olan 60 adet jakarlı ve 10 adet brode tezgahtan ibarettir.

Sürekli yatırımı hedefleyen, gelişen ve makine parkını yenileyen ve geliştiren, teknolojiye yatırım yapan firmamız ayrıca inşaat ve petrol işletmeciliğiyle de ülkemize hizmet vermekte olup istihdama imkan sağlamaktadır.
ETD Tekstil çevreye duyarlı üretim anlayışı ile araştırma geliştirmeye önem vererek kalitesini sürekli artırmaktadır. Teknolojisini aynı zamanda sektöründeki diğer firmalarla da paylaşmakta ve hizmet vermektedir. Gören Şirketler Grubu bünyesinde faaliyetini sürdüren E.T.D Tekstil iç piyasaya hizmet ettiği gibi ürettiği ürünleri orta Doğu ve Avrupa'da çeşitli ülkelere ihraç etmektedir. Firmamız ilke olarak daima ürünlerin kaliteli olmasını, müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutmuş, müşteri odaklı ve kalite politikasına önem veren bir anlayış benimsemiştir. Ar-Ge faaliyetlerine önem veren firmamız genç ve dinamik bir yönetim kadrosuyla faaliyetini sürdürmektedir.

Name: Ceccato Materassi
Description:
Să renaști din criză prin unirea forțelor, cu inovația și creativitatea ca baze solide: acesta este motivul de viață al organizației noastre.
CECCATO MATERASSI a luat naștere din experiența CIGNUS, o companie cu 50 de ani de experiență în sectorul sistemelor de dormit, menținându-și expertiza în proiectare și expertiză de fabricație în crearea de produse.
Mai mult, rămâne neschimbată dorința de a propune sisteme (saltele, baze de pat și perne) tehnologic din ce în ce mai avansate și perfect aderente la dorința de a satisface gusturile și nevoile utilizatorului, menite să răspundă exact principalelor probleme posturale.

Fondée en 1964 en partenariat avec BRITISH VITA MANCHESTER et ce jusqu’en 1991, VITAFOAM Madagascar est aujourd'hui la première marque nationale dans le domaine de la mousse. Avec près de 60 ans d'expérience, nous sommes fiers de notre position de Leader dans l'Industrie.

Tous nos produits, y compris notre gamme de literie VITAFOAM, sont fabriqués dans nos trois usines, équipées de machines de pointe. Chaque étape de notre processus de fabrication est soigneusement contrôlée et assurée par nos équipes de techniciens hautement qualifiés. Forts d'un savoir-faire et de compétences transmis depuis trois générations, nous nous engageons à maintenir les normes élevées qui ont fait la réputation de VITAFOAM.
Nous attachons une grande importance à la satisfaction de nos clients. Notre objectif est de vous offrir des matelas et des produits en mousse qui répondent aux plus hautes exigences de confort, de durabilité et de qualité.
Chez VITAFOAM Madagascar, nous sommes fiers de notre Héritage et de notre Engagement envers l'Excellence. Bientôt 60 ans dans l'industrie témoignent de notre expertise et de notre dévouement à fournir des Produits de Haute Qualité à nos clients.

Name: Groll GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Innovationsfreude und individuell gefertigte Produkte – dafür steht seit
vielen Jahrzehnten die Marke Grosana. Dahinter steckt die Firma Groll GmbH
& Co. KG, ein Familienbetrieb am Fuße der Schwäbischen Alb, welches Schlafsysteme von höchster Qualität entwickelt und produziert – Spitzenprodukte, made im Ländle. 
Dabei treffen zwei Welten aufeinander – Automation und Handarbeit: Die Mitarbeitenden sind leidenschaftliche Tüftler:innen, helfende Hände, fleißige Macher:innen. Sie alle finden im eigenkonzipierten Maschinenpark das optimale Umfeld, um ihr Potential zu entfalten und mit Hilfe modernster Ingenieurskunst Top-Produkte zu fertigen. Dadurch ist es möglich, jedem Typ Mensch einen Schlafkomfort der Extraklasse zu bieten. So erhielt das Unternehmen Groll mit der Marke Grosana bereits diverse Auszeichnungen und freut sich regelmäßig über Rückmeldung vieler zufriedener Kunden. Doch was motiviert das Unternehmen täglich zu Spitzenleistung ? Es ist längst wissenschaftlich erwiesen: Schlaf beeinflusst ganz direkt Leistungsfähigkeit, Gesundheit und Lebensenergie des Menschen – kurz: die Lebensqualität.
Und genau für diese arbeitet Groll jeden Tag aufs Neue.

So wird z.B. volle Kontrolle über die Materialien gewährleistet sowie
Kontamination durch Schadstoffe vermieden. Zudem werden durch kurze Transportwege Kosten gespart und die Umwelt geschont. Gerade Letzteres ist eine Herzensangelegenheit der Familie Schwenk, welche das Traditionsunternehmen seit 3 Generationen mit Ehrlichkeit und Fairness erfolgreich durch die Jahrzehnte geleitet hat. Diese Werte
wissen Mitarbeiter, Partner und Lieferanten zu schätzen. Das wohl wichtigste
„Warum“ für die Menschen hinter Groll ist jedoch das wohlige Aufatmen,
wenn der Kunde sich auf eine Grosana Matratze legt.

Name: Sogno Veneto - materassi, reti e cuscini
Description:
Sogno Veneto racconta una storia di Persone, Qualità e Passione. La nostra avventura inizia nel 1983 in un piccolo garage in provincia di Treviso, dove operavamo come officina per la lavorazione del metallo. Successivamente, ci siamo specializzati nei telai delle reti in metallo.

La passione per il nostro lavoro, l’importante contributo dei nostri Collaboratori, gli investimenti costanti in tecnologie e la propensione al continuo miglioramento ci hanno permesso di ampliare progressivamente la gamma di prodotti. Inizialmente concentrati sulle reti in metallo, abbiamo poi sviluppato la produzione delle reti in legno di faggio, materassi e cuscini.

Sogno Veneto è una delle rare realtà che produce internamente tutta la gamma di prodotti, 100% realizzati in Italia. Da oltre 40 anni, mettiamo passione nella ricerca dei materiali più performanti, come acciaio, legno e tessuti, trovando soluzioni innovative per migliorare la qualità del Dormire.

Poniamo grande attenzione alla ricerca, alla sostenibilità e alle tendenze, per offrire il miglior comfort personalizzabile in base ai bisogni e ai desideri delle Persone. La nostra missione è esprimere quel sogno che ogni giorno ci porta a migliorare il Valore al Dormire.

Scopri di più sulla nostra dedizione e sulla gamma di prodotti su https://www.sognoveneto.it.

Name: DIMSTEL ΑΒΕΕ
Description:
ΦΙΛΟΣΟΦΙΑ & ΟΡΑΜΑ

Πιστεύουμε ότι ο καλός ύπνος είναι το θεμέλιο για μία ευτυχισμένη και υγιή ζωή. Με βάση αυτήν την πεποίθηση, δημιουργούμε στρώματα υψηλής ποιότητας στις υπερσύχρονες εγκαταστάσεις μας στην Ήπειρο, που ανταποκρίνονται στις ανάγκες της σύγχρονης κοινωνίας και τις προσδοκίες σας.

Στην DIMSTEL, η φιλοσοφία μας είναι να καθοδηγούμαστε από την ποιότητα, την καινοτομία και την παράδοση. Όλα τα στρώματα που φεύγουν από τις εγκαταστάσεις μας είναι αποτέλεσμα προσεκτικής σχεδίασης, υψηλής τεχνογνωσίας και προσεγμένης κατασκευής. Κάθε στρώμα προορίζεται για κάποιον δικό μας άνθρωπο, για το δικό μας σπίτι. Αυτό από μόνο του, μας οδήγησε να ονειρευτούμε μια επιχείρηση που θα μας κάνει περήφανους που είμαστε Έλληνες!

Χρησιμοποιούμε μόνο τα καλύτερα πιστοποιημένα υλικά που είναι φιλικά προς το περιβάλλον και παρέχουν την απόλυτη άνεση και στήριξη για έναν ξεκούραστο ύπνο. 

Κάθε στρώμα DIMSTEL αντιπροσωπεύει την αφοσίωσή μας στην ποιότητα και την αρτιότητα. Οι επιδόσεις μας ξεπερνούν τις προσδοκίες, καθώς συνεχίζουμε να αναβαθμίζουμε και να βελτιώνουμε τα προϊόντα μας με βάση τις τελευταίες επιστημονικές έρευνες και τις ανάγκες των πελατών μας.

Στη DIMSTEL, δεν απλά παράγουμε στρώματα ύπνου. Εμπνεόμαστε από την ικανοποίηση και την ευεξία που προσφέρει ένας αναζωογονητικός ύπνος. Το μότο μας, "κάνε τα όνειρα σου πραγματικότητα", αντικατοπτρίζει τη δέσμευσή μας να προσφέρουμε την καλύτερη δυνατή εμπειρία ύπνου στους πελάτες μας.

Θέλουμε να σας βοηθήσουμε να ζήσετε τη ζωή που ονειρεύεστε, ξεκινώντας από έναν ποιοτικό και αναζωογονητικό ύπνο.

Εμπιστευτείτε την DIMSTEL για να σας προσφέρει την απόλυτη ευεξία και να κάνει τα όνειρά σας πραγματικότητα.

Description:
Winco Foam is a leading manufacturer of polyurethane foam blocks, mattress accessories, underlays, and other cushioning products. We are also one of the largest and most experienced manufacturers in Nigeria. Our products are used in homes and offices as well as in hotels and hospitals.

Winco Foam's products are used by many businesses in Nigeria including hotels, hospitals, and commercial buildings. Winco has been manufacturing high-quality mattresses for more than 50 years and we continue to grow with the changing needs of our customers.

Everyone sleeps on a mattress but not every mattress guarantees quality sleep. We provide the best choice. At Winco Foam, our priority is ensuring we guide you in choosing the right mattress for your body type, thereby guaranteeing quality rest and a healthier lifestyle.

We are committed to helping Nigerians sleep better.

Name: Hualianda Mattress Machine Manufacturer
Description: Our mainly product includes several series: high-speed computerized chain stitch multi-needle quilting machines, high-speed computerized lock stitch multi-needle quilting machines, computerized single needle quilting machines, automatic motor cutting machines, intelligent motor lines, and thermal reset equipment. These products find wide application in fields like mattresses, car cushions, clothing, handbags, seat covers, and labor protection supplies.

Name: Elastica Schlafsysteme
Description:
Wir sind ein familiengeführter Markenartikelhersteller für Schlafsysteme aus Österreich. Bei uns steht »Gesunder Schlaf« im Mittelpunkt. Mit großer Leidenschaft forschen, entwickeln, produzieren und vertreiben wir Produkte, die den erholsamen Schlaf fördern. Unsere Hauptmarke, ELASTICA, steht für höchste Qualität und Komfort, und wir führen auch sorgfältig ausgewählte Handelsmarken.

Was uns besonders stolz macht, ist die Tatsache, dass unsere Elastica Matratzen entlang der gesamten Wertschöpfungskette ausschließlich in Österreich von unseren erfahrenen Händen hergestellt werden. Dabei legen wir größten Wert auf Handwerkskunst und Präzision, um das beste Schlafsystem bieten zu können.

Unser Familienunternehmen ist eng mit dem Ziel verbunden, unseren Kund:innen einen erholsamen und gesunden Schlaf zu ermöglichen. Wir wissen, wie wichtig es ist, jede Nacht optimal zu regenerieren, um den Herausforderungen des Alltags gewachsen zu sein. Daher setzen wir uns mit Leidenschaft dafür ein, innovative Lösungen zu entwickeln, die den Schlaf verbessern und zu einem energiegeladenen Start in den Tag verhelfen.

Name: Manley Blinds & Interiors
Description:

At Switch Blinds Middle East, we believe that quality window treatments should be accessible to everyone. We offer a wide selection of blinds and curtains of all styles, colors and materials to suit any taste. Our range of products is constantly expanding to meet the needs of our customers.
We strive to provide the highest quality products and service, and our team of experts is always available to answer your questions and guide you through the selection process. Our commitment is to ensure that you find the perfect window treatments for your home or office.

Description: Empresa com mais de 20 anos de atuação (desde 1999). Parque fabril próprio com aproximadamente 2.000 m² de área construída. Possui o maior showroom de fábrica do Sul do Brasil. Dispõe de espaço técnico completo que proporciona as melhores condições para a formação/especialização dos seus revendedores chamado “CES” (Centro de especialização Sunlux), onde disponibilizamos conteúdos de qualificação técnicos e comerciais. Nossos revendedores e clientes usufruem de uma empresa que entrega a solução mais completa para o desenvolvimento do trabalho e de soluções em design, funcionalidades e tecnologias com sua ampla gama de produtos. Está situada às margens da ERS 239, no município de Campo Bom/RS (região metropolitana de Porto Alegre). Localização estratégica e de fácil acesso.

Name: CHARLES BLYTH & CO LIMITED
Description:
Charles Blyth & Co Ltd is a family owned, family run, spring manufacturing company, established in 1939 that has seen four generations of the Blyth family.

We offer pocket springs, both round and flat frames & side supports in a variety of sizes, gauges & configurations. We are proud to say all of our pocket spring units are made with 100% British steel, completely recyclable and made with vegan & VOC free glue. 

We pride ourselves on quality of product as well as quality of service. Our experienced team includes individuals with over 20 years experience in the industry. We are always happy to assist with any of your needs from product development to contract orders and everything in between.

Based in the East Midlands, we are able to supply customers up and down the country. Feel free to contact us on 01332 810 283.

Name: Phoenix Mattress
Description: The Phoenix Iselect mattress was developed by Sanders Collection a bedding manufacturer for over 40 years. They sought to fill a void in the adjustable comfort mattress category. Until now if you were looking for  mattress that allows you to choose your comfort on your side of the bed you would be paying $3000+. The Phoenix Iselect mattresses make this accessible to broader consumer base looking for an affordable adjustable comfort mattress.

Name: Restivia
Description: Our family started in the mattress business over 35 years ago and the most important lessons learned were to deliver a first-class customer experience, provide highest quality products and superior value.

Name: Bedora The Sleep Journey
Description:
BEDORA specializes in the production of high-quality sleep and textile products. Our extensive portfolio includes a variety of mattresses, toppers, pillows, quilts, and bed linens. We offer a diverse range of bedding solutions that cater to both promotional and premium retail markets, ensuring a wide array of comfort and support options.

Why Choose BEDORA?
Together, we aim to deliver exceptional mattress and bedding products that enhance our consumers' daily rest and rejuvenation. Our expertise in the industry positions us as a reliable partner for profitable growth.

Diverse Product Offerings:
Our product range includes Foam Mattresses, Bonnell Mattresses, Hybrid Mattresses, Foam Mattress Toppers, a variety of Foam Pillows, Mattress Protectors, Silicon Fiber Pillows, Quilts, and much more.

Efficient Supply Chain:
All our products are sourced regionally, which allows us to maintain short lead times, competitive pricing, low transportation costs, and effective quality control. Each product is EUR1 certified.

Compressed Sleep Products:
We utilize a compression process for all our products, ensuring they are rolled and sealed for easy handling and storage.

Commitment to Sustainability:
BEDORA and all our raw material suppliers adhere to European standards, including ISO 900, ISO 14001, BS OHSAS 18001, CertiPUR, Oeko-Tex, BCSI, and SMETA SEDEX.

Quality Raw Materials:
Our products are crafted from certified materials, designed in line with contemporary trends, and manufactured to meet high-quality standards. 

Experience the difference with BEDORA, where quality sleep begins!

Name: Merossa
Description: A premium Egyptian manufacturer specializing in high-quality mattresses, recliner chairs, and pillows. Backed by a fully integrated factory and years of experience in private-label manufacturing for leading Egyptian brands, Merossa is now launching its own direct-to-consumer brand built on comfort, quality, and modern living.

Name: ORIONAS S.A.
Description:
Sleep is a source of health, joy, and longevity. With this as a principle that drives the business model of our company, ORION Strom tries every day to offer you the opportunity to enjoy quality sleep and create the bases for a life full of health, well-being, and positive energy.

With an emphasis on quality, detail, and innovation, we produce quality mattresses, pillows, and sleeping products, through specialized home and professional collections, which guarantee the ideal choice for the needs of every occasion.

State-of-art machinery & equipment
Investing in state-of-the-art machinery, equipped with innovative functions that ensure high production and eco-friendly consumption, is the main tactic of ORION Strom. 

Teamwork makes miracles!
Our biggest investment, however, remains our human resources. ORION Strom makes sure that it has excellently trained human resources that are distinguished for their specialized knowledge, reliability, and willingness to be next to your needs.

Our philosophy
Focusing on our client’s needs, we work tirelessly to discover new development perspectives that will add quality to your life and help you to live up to the best version of yourself. Through continuous research and contact with your real needs, our goal is to continuously improve our products and services, ensuring the conditions for physical and mental health.

Name: Swede Dreams Mattresses - A part of Al Mazroui Group
Description:
Welcome to the LinkedIn page of Swede Dreams, the leading premium mattress manufacturing company in Abu Dhabi, UAE, and a proud member of the Al Mazroui Group. With a state-of-the-art factory located in Musaffah, Abu Dhabi, Swede Dreams is committed to providing its customers with the highest quality mattresses that ensure a comfortable and healthy sleep.

As the largest mattress manufacturing company in Abu Dhabi, Swede Dreams has been producing premium mattresses for over a decade. Our expert team of designers and technicians are dedicated to creating innovative and comfortable sleep solutions that cater to the unique needs of our customers.

At Swede Dreams, we understand the importance of a good night's sleep for overall well-being, which is why we use only the finest materials and cutting-edge technology in our manufacturing process. Our mattresses are designed to provide unparalleled comfort, support, and durability, ensuring a restful night's sleep every time.

Swede Dreams has successfully completed 100+ hospitality projects, providing premium sleep solutions for the hotel industry in UAE and beyond.

As part of the Al Mazroui Group, Swede Dreams operates with the utmost professionalism and integrity. We take pride in our commitment to customer satisfaction, and we strive to exceed our customers' expectations with our exceptional products and services.

We are proud to have earned the trust and loyalty of our customers, and we look forward to continuing to serve them with our premium sleep solutions. Thank you for visiting our LinkedIn page, and we invite you to connect with us to learn more about our products and services.

Name: NESA PNG FOAM LIMITED
Description:
Nesa PNG Foam is proudly a supplier of locally manufactured quality products in Port Moresby, Papua New Guinea. With over 20 years of operation since it commenced in 1998, it's foundation and success as a privately owned business is based on great heritage of ethical principles - hard work - integrity - honesty and unwavering commitment to supply high quality products and services to our customers. We have shown a consistent commitment to supply customers with outstanding value, unrivalled expertise and superior customer service. 

Our ethos in manufacturing, is to combine the best raw materials; state of the art technology and in depth skills to create products that meet and exceed our customers' requirements. Our professional team is seasoned, talented and friendly, we can deliver custom made products with fervent attention to detail. 

We are specialists in the areas of;
• Foam products 
• Curtain fabrication and installation
• Furniture upholstery and fabrication 
• Marine covers and clears fabrication - custom made
• Marine walling and carpeting and interior repairs - custom made 
• Vehicle tonneau covers, interior seats cover re-fabrication, headlining  recovery and carpeting 
• PMV canopies - custom made 
• Shade cloth or nursery cloth installations 

Nesa PNG Foam products can be found in major department stores in Port Moresby including;
● Brian Bell
● Courts
● BNBM Hardware and Home Centre
● RH Hyper Mart Gordons & Vision City 
● Eliseo 
● Tango Tokarara & Boroko 
● J Mart Erima
● Fair Price
● Waterfront Department Store
● SVS, etc

You will see our logo "Nesa PNG Foam" on all of our products in all these stores. 

Our factory is located at Section: 55, Allotment: 16, Ago Street, Gordons Industrial, Port Moresby. 

We have 24 employees committed to the continual improvement as an employment provider. We are a member of the Employer's Federation of Papua New Guinea and provides ongoing and continual support to Job Training institutions.

Name: Simmons Italia
Description: Simmons è il primo marchio al mondo nel segmento del dormire: produttore internazionale attivo in 101 paesi del globo distribuiti in tutti i continenti, il suo brand è unanimemente riconosciuto come sinonimo di qualità ed è presente negli alberghi più importanti e prestigiosi. Ogni passaggio operativo, dalla selezione delle materie prime alla loro lavorazione e assemblaggio, è realizzato direttamente all’interno degli stabilimenti Simmons in Italia.

Name: CIL - Compagnie Ivoirienne de Literie
Description:
Nous le savons, nous passons un tiers de notre vie à dormir, soit 25 ans en moyenne. Le sommeil joue un rôle capital dans notre vie, notre bien-être physique et psychique.

La Compagnie Ivoirienne de Literie (CIL) a compris très tôt qu’un bon matelas permettrait d’améliorer la santé et le bien être des ivoiriens. C’est pourquoi depuis le début de notre existence en 2008, fort d’une expérience de plus de 15 ans dans la confection de matelas, nous sommes parvenus à bâtir une solide réputation de qualité au point de devenir le leader incontesté de la literie en Côte d’Ivoire et dans la sous-région.

Notre secret ? Une passion pour l'innovation et une technologie de pointe qui nous permettent de repousser les limites du confort et de la qualité.

Chaque matelas que nous créons est le fruit d'une recherche approfondie et d'un savoir faire exceptionnel, confectionné avec la précision de nos artisans et l'innovation de nos visionnaires garantissant ainsi une expérience de sommeil incomparable.

Notre excellence n'a pas seulement gagné le cœur de nos clients, mais elle a également été reconnue sur la scène nationale et internationale !

4 fois Lauréat du Label de consommateurs africains, notre matelas MEDICODORSAL CIL s'impose aujourd'hui comme le meilleur matelas de Côte d'Ivoire, Elu Produit et Service de l'Année 2020, 2021, 2021-2022, 2023 & 2024.

La Compagnie Ivoirienne de Literie est plus qu'un Leader, c'est une Légende qui réécrit les règles du sommeil en Côte d'Ivoire.

Name: Mattress Industries | White-Label & Custom Mattress Manufacturing | Made in New Jersey
Description:
Mattress Industries is a New Jersey–based B2B mattress manufacturer specializing in white-label and fully custom production with fast, reliable turnaround times.
We partner with retailers, e-commerce brands, hospitality groups, and designers to build mattresses that match their exact specifications — materials, firmness, size, design, and branding.

With no minimum order requirements, in-stock raw materials, and 24-hour project kickoff, we make it easy for businesses to launch new products, expand existing lines, or scale quickly. Every mattress is manufactured in-house for consistent quality, competitive pricing, and full customization.

Whether you need a private-label collection or a custom prototype built fast, Mattress Industries delivers flexibility, speed, and American-made craftsmanship you can count on.

Fast Start. Fast Turnaround. Made in New Jersey. Built for B2B.

Name: MM Matratzen Manufaktur GmbH
Description: The MM Matratzenmanufaktur GmbH manufactures mattresses made of cold foam with an integrated, metal-free spring core in St. Andrä, Austria. This combination allows both a comfortable, ergonomic and thus healthy lying position and ensures optimal ventilation of the mattress.

Name: Gli Artigiani del Riposo
Description:
Vogliamo essere, nel mondo, punti di riferimento della cultura e dell'eccellenza del dormire sano. 

Un'azienda innovativa che propone i migliori prodotti e la cultura del sano riposo e che, grazie a ciò cresce e diventa leader dell'alta gamma.

La nostra visione guida ogni aspetto della nostra attività, in un percorso di crescita sostenibile, qualità e rispetto.

Le persone sono ispirate a dare il meglio in un ambiente di lavoro ideale, dove efficienza, responsabilità, dinamismo, ispirazione, creatività, passione e ricerca della perfezione sono le linee guida per offrire prodotti di qualità capaci di anticipare e soddisfare i desideri e le esigenze delle persone.

Ogni nostra azione è attenta all'ambiente, cerchiamo di fare la nostra parte scegliendo materie prime sempre più naturali e differenziamo gli scarti di lavorazione incentivando il riciclo.

Name: Crilu srl
Description:
Tappezzeria artigianale nata per la realizzazione di arredi interni ed esterni e specializzata nella creazione di articoli custom su disegno o richiesta di clienti privati, architetti e cantieri navali. Lavoriamo in Costa Azzurra, Alta Savoia (Megéve e Courchevel), Svizzera (Ginevra, Gstaad, Montreaux) e realizziamo anche articoli per la spedizione in paesi come Emirati Arabi Uniti, Stati Uniti o Africa.

Artisan upholstery born for the creation of internal and external furnishings and specialized in the creation of custom items based on designs or requests of private customers, architects and shipyards. We work in the Côte d'Azur, Haute-Savoie (Megéve and Courchevel), Switzerland (Geneva, Gstaad, Montreaux) and also make items for shipping to countries such as the United Arab Emirates, the United States or Africa.

Name: Hugg Sleep
Description: At HUGG, we’re redefining rest through the power of nature and science. As the first Biocrystal-infused mattress in the UAE, our mission is to offer more than just comfort—we deliver a sleep experience that supports your body, mind, and overall well-being. Our mattresses are infused with a clinically tested blend of 16 natural crystals that help reduce stress, ease muscle tension, and promote deeper, restorative sleep. Each HUGG mattress is crafted with sustainable materials and wrapped in soft micro-TENCEL fabric, combining luxury with proven health benefits. At HUGG, we don’t just sell mattresses. We create natural sleep solutions that work while you rest—so you can wake up energized, refreshed, and ready for life.

Name: Foam Package Inc (Master MoltyFoam)
Description:
Foam Package Inc: Our Promise to You Is Your Dream Lifestyle

Step into a world of comfort and rejuvenation at Master Molty Foam Mattress Emporium. Conveniently located at 34-C, Seher Commercial ,Defence Housing Authority, Phase 7, Karachi; our showroom offers a haven dedicated to delivering the best in sleep innovation and relaxation.

At Foam Package Inc, we think that getting a good night's sleep is crucial for leading a happy life. Our store features a wide selection of high-end mattresses that have been carefully created to meet various sleep needs and preferences. Every mattress, whether it's made of memory foam or a hybrid design, is a work of art made to cradle you in comfort.

Our showroom is more than just a place to shop – it's an oasis of tranquility. As you step inside, you'll be greeted by an ambiance that whispers relaxation. Our mattresses are thoughtfully laid out to encourage you to experience them firsthand. Our knowledgeable sleep experts are available to guide you through the features of each mattress, ensuring you find the perfect fit for your sleep sanctuary.

Name: SleepSoul
Description:
SleepSoul: Elevating Your Sleep Experience

At SleepSoul, we understand that a great night's sleep is essential for overall well-being. Our mission is to provide high-quality, affordable hybrid mattresses that help you drift into deep, restful slumber every night.

The SleepSoul Commitment

We are committed to delivering mattresses that combine luxury and practicality. Our products are crafted with advanced sleep technology and premium materials, ensuring both comfort and support.

Innovative Design

Our hybrid mattresses blend traditional and modern designs. The combination of pocket springs and memory foam creates a supportive yet plush surface that adapts to your body's unique contours. This design relieves pressure points and promotes spinal alignment, reducing tossing and turning.

Why Choose SleepSoul?

- Optimal Comfort and Support: Wake up refreshed and pain-free
- High-Quality Materials: Durable and long-lasting
- Affordable Luxury: Enjoy high-end comfort without the high price.
- Customer Satisfaction: Hassle-free returns and excellent service.

Experience the Difference

With a SleepSoul mattress, you’ll experience the joy of a good night's sleep, feeling rejuvenated and ready to tackle the day. Discover the SleepSoul difference and enhance your sleep quality today.

Thank you for choosing SleepSoul. We look forward to helping you achieve the restful sleep you deserve. Visit our website to explore our range and find the perfect mattress for you.

Name: vistar ansar
Description: شرکت ویستر یکی از پیشگامان صنعت تولید تشک و کالای خواب است که با بیش از ۱۵ سال تجربه، به ارائه محصولات با کیفیت و نوآورانه برای بهبود راحتی خواب مشتریان خود میپردازد. ما با استفاده از بهترین مواد اولیه و فناوریهای روز، تشکها، بالشها و سایر ملزومات خواب را طراحی و تولید میکنیم. ویستر تنها برند ایرانی است که محصولات خود را با متدهای روز دنیا طراحی کرده و استانداردهای اروپایی را رعایت میکند. ماموریت ما ارتقاء کیفیت خواب افراد و فراهم کردن تجربهای راحت و سالم برای همه است. با تیمی متخصص و متعهد، محصولات ویستر در بازارهای مختلف شناخته شده و مورد اعتماد است.

Name: MECTEND srl

Name: Colchobel
Description:
Colchobel | Há mais de 30 anos transformando o sono em qualidade de vida.

Desde 1993, a Colchobel constrói uma trajetória marcada por inovação, confiança e compromisso com o bem-estar. Nascemos em Belo Horizonte com um propósito claro: garantir noites mais tranquilas e dias mais produtivos para milhares de pessoas em diversas partes do Brasil.

Ao longo das décadas, crescemos com solidez, investindo em tecnologia, processos modernos e uma equipe apaixonada pelo que faz. Acreditamos que o verdadeiro conforto está nos detalhes e é por isso que cuidamos de cada etapa com excelência.

Mais do que descanso, entregamos experiências que impactam positivamente a saúde, a rotina e a vida das pessoas. Porque quem dorme bem, vive melhor.

Colchobel. Boa noite, ótimo dia.

Name: DREAMS Mattress
Description:
Pankaj Gupta, MD of RP Foam Home Pvt. Ltd. tells us how foam based industry is expected to do in the market in the next few years and how the industry should consider online as a new medium to connect with the consumer.

He shares his expertise in high-tier quality standards, European machinery, a rigorous focus on testing, and product experience to create the ‘Dreams’ impact that he is proud of.

Name: Vencasa
Description:
Since 1985, the Pharmaline brand has served the comfort and wellness needs of the refined South African sleeper and in 2017 the brand was given a facelift and a reinvigorated sense of purpose with its rebranding as Vencasa.

Vencasa is a South African retailer specialising in luxury bedding and sleep solutions. We offer a wide range of products, including mattresses, pillows, bedding accessories, and sleep technology devices. With over three decades of in-house experience sourcing premium quality products from the world’s most renowned bed and bedding brands, we now partner with sleep specialists from across the globe and put that experience and expertise to work for the local market.

The spirit and passion at the heart of the brand has never changed. If anything, we have grown more focused and we believe as strongly as ever, that the positive physiological and psychological effects of a good night’s sleep cannot be overestimated.

Name: SOLECRA
Description: SOLECRA is an expert in window covering for both indoors and outdoors use. Our mission is to offer our customers the best solutions tailored to their needs using the highest quality materials, at a competitive price.

Name: Skyview Blinds & Shades
Description:
Welcome to Skyview Blinds & Shades, a full service window treatment company to provide service for all your window and wall coverings need. With us, you will be provided with a competitive quote along with excellent customer service generated from experience in the window treatment industry. We are committed to providing a large range of high quality products and services to suit your needs at competitive prices.

Whether you need a free quote for a single or multiple windows, wallpapers, measurements, installation, we will take care of it. We at Skyview Blinds & Shades are committed to excellence.

Name: Safari Mattress
Description:
Elevate your sleep game with Safari Mattresses. Our innovative design and premium materials ensure maximum comfort and support.

Safari Mattresses help you wake up refreshed and ready for your next adventure. Explore our range of supportive mattresses and pillows for a sleep experience that complements your active lifestyle.

Name: Soppos Sinar Global
Description:
Soppos Sinar Global is a leading mattress manufacturer based in Indonesia, catering to the needs of the middle to low-end market. Name: Panorama Relax S.R.L.
Description:
Panorama Relax, l'azienda leader nella produzione di materassi e sistemi di riposo di alta qualità, dove la passione per il benessere guida ogni azione. La nostra missione è semplice: offrire ai nostri clienti il massimo comfort per notti di riposo rigeneranti e giornate piene di energia. Ogni nostro prodotto è frutto di un'autentica passione per il sonno, realizzato con amore e dedizione per trasformare il riposo in un'esperienza di puro relax.

La nostra attenzione ai dettagli e l'uso di materiali pregiati fanno sì che ogni materasso sia un'opera d'arte di comfort e durabilità. Dalla selezione delle migliori materie prime alla lavorazione artigianale, ogni fase del processo produttivo è curata con estrema meticolosità per garantire la massima qualità. Il nostro impegno verso i clienti va oltre la semplice vendita: ascoltiamo attentamente le loro esigenze e i loro desideri, offrendo soluzioni personalizzate per soddisfare ogni esigenza di riposo. La nostra assistenza clienti è sempre pronta a fornire consigli esperti e supporto continuo, perché crediamo che la soddisfazione del cliente sia la chiave del nostro successo.

In Panorama Relax, uniamo le tecniche artigianali tradizionali con le innovazioni tecnologiche più avanzate, creando prodotti all'avanguardia che rispettano al contempo le radici del vero Made In Italy. Siamo consapevoli dell'importanza di un approccio sostenibile e adottiamo pratiche produttive eco-compatibili e materiali riciclabili, contribuendo a preservare il nostro pianeta per le generazioni future. Con Panorama Relax, ogni notte diventa un viaggio nel benessere. Scopri la differenza di dormire su un materasso progettato con passione, cura e amore per te.

Name: Baba La Literie
Description:
Chez Baba la Literie bien dormir est une nécessité.

Baba la Literie fut crée en juin 2020, l'entreprise s'inspire de la société familiale, La Centrale Des Affaires. qui à été créé il y a 20 ans et qui existe toujours. 

Baba La Literie compte aujourd'hui deux boutique au coeur de Paris.

Son objectif est de satisfaire la demande de sa clientèle BtoB & BtoC en leur proposant de créer leur lit sur mesure, du sommier aux oreillers. 

Le monde entier a été touché par la COVID et un confinement est instauré. Comme tous les autres étudiants de France, Elias alias Baba, 21 ans, passe donc tout son temps chez lui et suit ses cours en ligne. 
Très vite, comme nombreux d’entre nous, il se rend compte que plus il reste chez lui, plus il remarque l’inconfort de sa maison et du besoin d’avoir un environnement agréable. 

Il fait également le constat qu’il y a plus de 7 milliards d’être humains sur Terre, et qu’il n’y a pas un seul individu qui ne dort pas la nuit.

Simultanément, il recherche une alternance dans le cadre de ses études, et la situation économique ne lui permet pas de trouver une entreprise. 

En partant de sa situation et de ce constat, il décide donc de se mettre en contrat d’alternance dans sa propre entreprise : Baba La Literie afin de donner l’accessibilité à tous de passer des nuits sans insomnie.

Notre promesse : 

Chez Baba, bien dormir est une nécessité. C’est dans ce sens que nous avons étudié chaque étape qui vous donne accès à ce droit, de la fabrication à la livraison et ce, à un prix accessible.

L'équipe Baba La Literie est spécialisé dans le sommeil ainsi que dans le besoin de ces clients, c'est pour cela que nous proposons des produits de qualité et des conseils personnalisé à tout nos clients.

Ainsi nos produits sont à un prix accessible pour vous garantir le meilleur rapport qualité prix et un vaste choix parmi nos produits.
